title: hieracium pseudobifidum subsp. subpleiophyllum
intro: Hieracium pseudobifidum subsp. subpleiophyllum is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like plants of the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is known for its unique, pleiophyllous leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium pseudobifidum subsp. subpleiophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
